overview: Union Territory-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Puducherry.

rules.title: Review Puducherry Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Puducherry Shops and Establishments legislation is applicable.

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under Puducherry labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under applicable Puducherry labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Puducherry provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Puducherry.

citations.reference: Government of Puducherry Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Puducherry Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments and circulars issued by the Government of Puducherry.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, labour records, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, inspections, licence renewals and labour compliance due dates.
